top_signals.title: Pentagon spars with SpaceX over Starlink price hike during Iran war
top_signals.summary: The Pentagon should be paying more for access to their satellite Wi-Fi network, SpaceX officials argues.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The U.S. Military Lacks an Ethics Doctrine. Combat Effectiveness Suffers
top_signals.summary:
In 2004, I was a boot (translation: brand new) first lieutenant in 1st Battalion, 7th Marines at a retransmission site in the middle of nowhere, al-Qa’im, Iraq. I heard a sudden explosion and small-arms fire two kilometers away. The battalion radio net burst with chatter, with someone saying there were three casualties: two urgent surgicals (send help quickly!) and one routine (no rush to provide aid). Someone in the operating center asked about the status of the routine casualty, and the radio crackled with the kind of transmission that changes everything. “It’s Whiskey Six, he’s KIA [killed in action].” I

The post The U.S. Military Lacks an Ethics Doctrine. Combat Effectiveness Suffers appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UBS’s Khan Says AI Will Have ‘Ramifications’ on Jobs
top_signals.summary: UBS Group AG’s Asia Pacific President Iqbal Khan said artificial intelligence will free up capacity and improve productivity but also have an impact on jobs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Decisions taken by the Governing Council of the ECB (in addition to decisions setting interest rates)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston to step down after 19 years at helm of cloud storage pioneer
top_signals.summary: Dropbox CEO Drew Houston, who started the cloud storage company when he was 24, plans to step down and assume the role of executive chairman.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Walmart launches LTL truck consolidation program for suppliers
top_signals.summary:
Walmart is using automation to help streamline inbound shipment consolidation for vendors who prepay for the service.

The post Walmart launches LTL truck consolidation program for suppliers appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Chip stocks continue to surge. Here's how to buy into the trend for less
top_signals.summary: Mike Khouw happens to like one surging chip stock in particular: Marvell Technology.

top_signals.title: BHP blames tech limits for climate delays exposed in leaked documents
top_signals.summary: BHP says battery-electric haul trucks are not yet viable at scale as it defends postponing Pilbara decarbonization projects.
